trans-unit.note: Source details text shown for packages from implicit channel or channels without Aspire* package source mappings

trans-unit.source: The 'staging' channel cannot be resolved deterministically when running a daily/CI Aspire CLI build (CLI version: '{0}'). To update against staging, either run a stable Aspire CLI build, or set the 'overrideStagingFeed' configuration value to an explicit staging feed URL (for example: 'aspire config set overrideStagingFeed <url>').
trans-unit.target: The 'staging' channel cannot be resolved deterministically when running a daily/CI Aspire CLI build (CLI version: '{0}'). To update against staging, either run a stable Aspire CLI build, or set the 'overrideStagingFeed' configuration value to an explicit staging feed URL (for example: 'aspire config set overrideStagingFeed <url>').
trans-unit.note: Error/warning shown when the 'staging' package channel is requested but the running CLI is itself a daily/CI build with no explicit staging feed override. {0} is the CLI's informational version.
